indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no chair or seating arrangement suitable for extended computer use.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no lighting specifically designed for task work, such as a desk lamp.

indicators.name: no dedicated layout
indicators.rationale: The space is open and lacks a dedicated area for computer work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for computer work (solo). There is no flat work surface, no ergonomic seating, no task lighting, and no dedicated layout for computer work. The space is too open and lacks the necessary components for a productive workstation.
